Operation 'submitObservableForm' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks clarity about return values and the distinction between new submissions and retrieving cached results. Added details about supported observable types for consistency, explicit mention of asynchronous processing, and clarification that existing results are retrieved from cache (7-day retention per API context). This helps AI agents understand the dual-purpose nature of this endpoint.

data.current_description: Submit one or more observables for analysis via form POST. Can also accept a previous request ID to retrieve existing results.
data.description_suggestion: Submit one or more observables for reputation analysis via form POST, or provide a previous request ID to retrieve existing cached results. Supports the same observable types as the GET endpoint (IPv4, IPv6, FQDN, URL, MD5, SHA1, SHA256, EMAIL). Returns a unique request ID for new submissions or cached results for existing request IDs. Analysis is processed asynchronously.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity about return values and the distinction between new submissions and retrieving cached results. Added details about supported observable types for consistency, explicit mention of asynchronous processing, and clarification that existing results are retrieved from cache (7-day retention per API context). This helps AI agents understand the dual-purpose nature of this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getEngineList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Current description is generic about 'all analysis engines' without context. Added specific engine examples from API context and clarified the use case (understanding engine capabilities for specific observable types). This helps AI agents understand the purpose of this reference endpoint and how to leverage it when planning analysis strategies.

data.current_description: Returns the static list of all analysis engines with their supported observable types, descriptions, and risk assessment capabilities.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the static list of all available analysis engines including IPinfo, AbuseIPDB, VirusTotal, urlscan.io, Google Safe Browsing, GreyNoise, Pulsedive, and others. For each engine, returns supported observable types, descriptions, and risk assessment capabilities. Use this to understand which engines analyze specific observable types.
